textSpans.text: Medical Condition related to Home Health
home requires considerable and taxing effort and is
Education for safe use of assistive device
Procedure Description: right total shoulder arthroplasty
23430: tenodesis of long tendon of biceps
23472: arthroplasty, glenohumeral joint; total shoulder (glenoid and proximal humeral replacement (eg, total shoulder))
23333: removal of foreign body, shoulder; deep (subfascial or intramuscular)
Ancef 1 gram TXA at incision and another gram during closure
HPI: This is a 73 year old female who:
1. is being seen for a chief complaint of right shoulder.
Toni presents today for right shoulder
She is scheduled for a right anatomic total shoulder arthroplasty on 04/14/26 at Valley
Reviewed and no changes noted April
Right upper extremity exam notable for the
Active forward flexion 90 degrees. 4 out of 5
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
Patient Specific Notes: Toni presents today for preoperative visit.
She will follow up 2 weeks after her surgery.
The right shoulder was braced with a ultrasling, Shoulder orthosis, abduction.
I recommend continued use of the orthosis until next follow up.
Follow up for: Further Evaluation and Management - 5 minutes.
I saw the patient with Rhianna McGowan, elicited a history, performed an exam, and developed an impression and plan.
I was present for all key aspects
Shoulder Arthritis, Right: located on the right shoulder.
Electronically Signed By: Lawrence R Huff, MD, 04/06/2026 09:53 AM PDT
Electronically Signed By: Rhianna I McGowan, PA-C, 04/05/2026 09:05 PM PDT
